notes: Solid breakout implementation with good bounce physics, level progression, and 3D brick styling, but the ball angle randomization on reset can occasionally produce near-horizontal trajectories and the collision bounce direction logic has minor edge-case issues.
An exceptionally well-crafted implementation that anticipates and prevents common physics bugs (like wall-sticking and double-bouncing), features a great 3D brick effect, and plays perfectly.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout with working start/pause/lives/levels, but collision and input handling are somewhat rough and not polished enough for a higher score.
